mapper.sql: f.is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(f.is_spare, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(f.roll_no_status, 1) != 3 AND COALESCE(f.finish_status, 0) != 4 AND ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM biz_process_stage_output sfo WHERE sfo.finish_roll_uuid = f.uuid AND sfo.is_deleted = 0 ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM biz_process_stage_output sff WHERE sff.finish_roll_uuid = f.uuid AND sff.is_deleted = 0 AND sff.output_type = 2 AND sff.output_status = 3 ) )

SELECT ps.order_uuid, COALESCE(ps.machine_uuid, r.machine_uuid, 'none') AS machine_uuid, COALESCE(ps.machine_name_snap, stepMachine.machine_name, rollMachine.machine_name, '未分配机台') AS machine_name, CASE WHEN ps.step_type = 2 AND ps.process_weight IS NOT NULL THEN ps.process_weight * 1000 WHEN ps.input_type = 2 AND inputOutput.uuid IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(inputOutput.actual_weight, inputOutput.estimate_weight, 0) ELSE COALESCE(r.actual_weight, r.total_weight, r.roll_weight, 0) END AS processWeight, COALESCE(ps.step_amount, 0) AS stepAmount FROM biz_process_step ps JOIN biz_original_roll r ON r.uuid = ps.original_uuid AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(r.process_mode, 0) != 3 LEFT JOIN sys_machine stepMachine ON stepMachine.uuid = ps.machine_uuid LEFT JOIN sys_machine rollMachine ON rollMachine.uuid = r.machine_uuid JOIN biz_process_order o ON o.uuid = ps.order_uuid AND o.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN biz_process_stage_output inputOutput ON inputOutput.uuid = ps.input_output_uuid AND inputOutput.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ps.is_deleted = 0 AND o.order_status IN (4, 5)

SELECT sd.order_uuid, SUM(CASE WHEN st.settleTotal > 0 THEN COALESCE( so.total_amount, CAST(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(so.snap_bill, '$.total_amount')) AS DECIMAL(18, 2)), CAST(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(so.snap_bill, '$.totalAmount')) AS DECIMAL(18, 2)), st.settleTotal, 0 ) * COALESCE(sd.order_amount, 0) / st.settleTotal ELSE 0 END) AS billedAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN st.settleTotal > 0 THEN COALESCE(rr.receivedAmount, 0) * COALESCE(sd.order_amount, 0) / st.settleTotal ELSE 0 END) AS receivedAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN st.settleTotal > 0 THEN COALESCE(rr.cashReceivedAmount, 0) * COALESCE(sd.order_amount, 0) / st.settleTotal ELSE 0 END) AS cashReceivedAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN st.settleTotal > 0 THEN COALESCE(rr.scrapOffsetAmount, 0) * COALESCE(sd.order_amount, 0) / st.settleTotal ELSE 0 END) AS scrapOffsetAmount FROM biz_settle_detail sd JOIN biz_settle_order so ON so.uuid = sd.settle_uuid AND so.is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(so.settle_status, 1) IN (1, 2, 3) JOIN ( SELECT settle_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(order_amount, 0)) AS settleTotal FROM biz_settle_detail WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY settle_uuid ) st ON st.settle_uuid = sd.settle_uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT settle_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(receive_amount, 0)) AS receivedAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN cash_amount IS NULL AND COALESCE(scrap_offset_amount, 0) = 0 THEN COALESCE(receive_amount, 0) ELSE COALESCE(cash_amount, 0) END) AS cashReceivedAmount, SUM(COALESCE(scrap_offset_amount, 0)) AS scrapOffsetAmount FROM biz_receive_record WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(record_status, 1) = 1 GROUP BY settle_uuid ) rr ON rr.settle_uuid = sd.settle_uuid WHERE sd.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY sd.order_uuid
mapper.select: SELECT o.order_status AS status, CASE o.order_status WHEN 0 THEN '草稿' WHEN 1 THEN '待下发' WHEN 2 THEN '加工中' WHEN 3 THEN '待回录' WHEN 4 THEN '已完成' WHEN 5 THEN '已结算' WHEN 6 THEN '已作废' ELSE '未知' END AS statusName, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(orig.originalWeight), 0) AS originalWeight FROM biz_process_order o LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(actual_weight, total_weight, roll_weight, 0)) AS originalWeight FROM biz_original_roll WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(process_mode, 0) != 3 GROUP BY order_uuid ) orig ON orig.order_uuid = o.uuid WHERE o.is_deleted = 0 AND o.order_status IN (0, 1, 2, 3) GROUP BY o.order_status ORDER BY o.order_status

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(o.order_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(orig.originalWeight), 0) AS originalWeight, COALESCE(SUM(fin.finishWeight), 0) AS finishWeight, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, o.total_amount, 0)), 0) AS amount FROM biz_process_order o LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(actual_weight, total_weight, roll_weight, 0)) AS originalWeight FROM biz_original_roll WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(process_mode, 0) != 3 GROUP BY order_uuid ) orig ON orig.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT f.order_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(f.actual_weight, f.estimate_weight, 0)) AS finishWeight FROM biz_finish_roll f WHERE GROUP BY f.order_uuid ) fin ON fin.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN (
) settle ON settle.order_uuid = o.uuid WHERE o.is_deleted = 0 AND o.order_status IN (4, 5) AND o.order_date >= #{monthStart} AND o.order_date <= #{today} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(o.order_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month

SELECT o.customer_uuid AS id, o.customer_name AS name, COUNT(*) AS count, COALESCE(SUM(orig.originalWeight), 0) AS weight, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, o.total_amount, 0)), 0) AS amount FROM biz_process_order o LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(actual_weight, total_weight, roll_weight, 0)) AS originalWeight FROM biz_original_roll WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(process_mode, 0) != 3 GROUP BY order_uuid ) orig ON orig.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN (
) settle ON settle.order_uuid = o.uuid WHERE o.is_deleted = 0 AND o.order_status IN (4, 5) AND o.order_date >= #{monthStart} AND o.order_date <= #{today} GROUP BY o.customer_uuid, o.customer_name ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT 6

SELECT o.customer_uuid AS id, o.customer_name AS name, COUNT(*) AS count, COALESCE(SUM(orig.originalWeight), 0) AS weight, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(settle.billedAmount, o.total_amount, 0)), 0) AS amount FROM biz_process_order o LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(actual_weight, total_weight, roll_weight, 0)) AS originalWeight FROM biz_original_roll WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(process_mode, 0) != 3 GROUP BY order_uuid ) orig ON orig.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN (
) settle ON settle.order_uuid = o.uuid WHERE o.is_deleted = 0 AND o.order_status IN (4, 5) AND o.order_date >= #{yearStart} AND o.order_date <= #{today} GROUP BY o.customer_uuid, o.customer_name ORDER BY amount DESC LIMIT 8

SELECT machine_uuid AS id, machine_name AS name, COUNT(DISTINCT order_uuid) AS count, COALESCE(SUM(processWeight), 0) AS weight, COALESCE(SUM(stepAmount), 0) AS amount FROM (
AND o.order_date >= #{monthStart} AND o.order_date <= #{today} ) rankedStep GROUP BY machine_uuid, machine_name ORDER BY weight DESC LIMIT 6

SELECT machine_uuid AS id, machine_name AS name, COUNT(DISTINCT order_uuid) AS count, COALESCE(SUM(processWeight), 0) AS weight, COALESCE(SUM(stepAmount), 0) AS amount FROM (
AND o.order_date >= #{yearStart} AND o.order_date <= #{today} ) rankedStep GROUP BY machine_uuid, machine_name ORDER BY weight DESC LIMIT 8

SELECT o.uuid, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.customer_name AS customerName, DATE_FORMAT(o.order_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS orderDate, o.priority, o.order_status AS orderStatus, o.print_status AS printStatus, COALESCE(orig.originalWeight, 0) AS originalWeight, COALESCE(fin.finishWeight, 0) AS finishWeight FROM biz_process_order o LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(actual_weight, total_weight, roll_weight, 0)) AS originalWeight FROM biz_original_roll WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(process_mode, 0) != 3 GROUP BY order_uuid ) orig ON orig.order_uuid = o.uuid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT f.order_uuid, SUM(COALESCE(f.actual_weight, f.estimate_weight, 0)) AS finishWeight FROM biz_finish_roll f WHERE GROUP BY f.order_uuid ) fin ON fin.order_uuid = o.uuid WHERE o.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY o.create_time DESC LIMIT 8
